title: logania granitica
intro: Logania granitica, also known as the granite logania or granite logania flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. Native to Australia, this plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Logania granitica are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Logania granitica is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
